- Translate English statements into logical expressions involving quantifiers, predicates, and logical operators, and vice versa.  
- Determine the truth value of quantified statements using predicate truth tables over finite domains.  
- Identify free and bound variables in logical expressions and understand the scope of quantifiers.  
- Recognize equivalent logical expressions with different variable names and scopes.  
- Evaluate and interpret quantified logical statements in real-world contexts and translate between formal logic and natural language.
